title: We can't retrain our way out of AI's economic disruption
abstract: We can't retrain our way out of AI's economic disruption may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform gen...
abstract_zh: 别指望靠重训就能搞定AI带来的经济巨变，这工具虽小众，但精准击中痛点！在这个AI快车道上，专车不比大巴差，尤其在技能升级这点上，它就是那辆贴地飞行的超跑！
